message:
fix: centralize error handling patterns in storage layer (bd-bwk2)

Completes the error handling consolidation started when errors.go was created:
- Wrap 10 bare error returns with wrapDBError/wrapDBErrorf for operation context
- Add missing rows.Err() checks in labels.go and epics.go
- Standardize sql.ErrNoRows checks to use errors.Is() across 14 files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,6 +6,7 @@ import (
 	"context"
 	"database/sql"
 	"encoding/json"
+	"errors"
 	"fmt"
 	"os"
 	"path/filepath"
@@ -300,7 +301,7 @@ func (s *SQLiteStorage) upsertIssueInTx(ctx context.Context, tx *sql.Tx, issue *
 		isTemplate = 1
 	}
 
-	if err == sql.ErrNoRows {
+	if errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
 		// Issue doesn't exist - insert it
 		_, err = tx.ExecContext(ctx, `
 			INSERT INTO issues (
